criteriaCoverage.evidence: rollup-reconcile.integration (real PG): emails_sent DERIVES from messages_log SET-to-truth (excludes failed+other month), idempotent on re-run, HEALS drift (999->7), workspace-scoped. usage.ts ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE SET value=EXCLUDED.value (vs dispatcher additive). events_ingested analogous.

cost.ts integer cents; evenShare distributes remainder penny-by-penny summing to fixedTotal; same active set as denominator AND iterated rows. cost-math: §20 example small $9 large $62.95 fixed $8; penny-exact on 37.01/3, 40/3. cost-view-sums-to-total.integration: sum cents===direct+fixed, $24.95 only on dedicated.

advisor strict ALL-AND: recommends only sustained+cadence+healthy; rejects one-off spike, single-blast cadence, unhealthy at volume, insufficient history. integration: qualifying persists ip_recommendation, ip_mode stays shared; buildIpRecommendationUpdate never sets dedicated/warming.

upgradeIp SES provisionDedicatedIp FIRST then DB (order asserted); SES throw -> no DB write (ip_mode stays shared). warmupSplit monotonic >0 ->1.0; chooseSendPool deterministic FNV-1a profile hash. $24.95 only ipUpgraded (dedicated|warming). real-PG transition preserves existing jsonb keys.

recommendations: Advisor reads `delivered` but computes rate against volume (emailsSent); remove unused read or compute against delivered. Cosmetic.
Add a 5-workspace integration case to match the §20 literal example end-to-end (unit tier already covers it).
Document that advisor reputation type='bounce' folds soft+hard so maxBounceRate is interpreted correctly.
